activeSlice.name: winui-zip-v1.0.5-lore-link-hotfix
activeSlice.goal: publish a v1.0.5 portable WinUI ZIP that keeps the friendly wrapper layout, avoids Explorer path-too-long extraction failures, and prevents dead local packaged Lore links
activeSlice.claimBoundary: release packaging hotfix only; no app feature, runtime proof, online multiplayer, installer/signing, SmartScreen, or gameplay parity claim
latestFindings: v1.0.3 remains a historical published release but is superseded because normal Downloads extraction can fail on deep lore-book proof-plan paths.
v1.0.4 fixed the Explorer path-length packaging issue but did not rewrite deeper unbundled Lore links inside packaged Lore pages.
v1.0.5 candidate ZIP SHA-256 is f8ba14a51ed57b14c3575a82f424de96c03b94453b03f19c6ed93a7ed5f65847 and byte size is 243916186.
v1.0.5 packages 53 BOOK.md-linked Lore reader files, rewrites deeper unbundled source links to GitHub source/search pages, and has max default Extract All relative path 133/180.
Package probe now rejects Explorer-unsafe long ZIP entries, raw root DLL/EXE layouts, hard-payload entries, and dead local packaged Lore links.
